prior_issues.description: MergeConfigs uses truthy checks for boolean fields (FailFast, Parallel, Monorepo, TracePropagation, OTel.Enabled). If the base config has fail_fast: true, the overlay cannot explicitly set it to false. The zero-value ambiguity makes 'disable this setting' impossible. This will cause surprising behavior when extending a base that enables fail_fast or parallel.

MergeConfigs boolean zero-value ambiguity: FailFast, Parallel, Monorepo, TracePropagation, OTel.Enabled are unconditionally overwritten from overlay. If base has fail_fast:true and overlay omits it, the zero-value false silently overrides. Fix requires *bool or explicit presence tracking.

Remote configs fetched via extends skip template processing: loadWithDepthAndResolver calls processTemplate on local file data but Parse() only (no processTemplate) on remote data fetched in the extends branch. Remote configs with {{ .Env.X }} templates will fail or produce literal braces.
fetchHTTP parameter 'url' shadows the net/url import — confusing to readers, fragile under future edits that may need url.Parse inside that function
